case_title: KUO CHANG VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,189.95 FILED BY CHANG, KUO AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK INC. (CT CORPORATION, AGENT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
